school.name: The Schoolhouse
school.description: Each teacher at the schoolhouse leads a different class in a different room. Work out who teaches what, and where.
clues: Either 75% goes with Period 3 or Period 4 goes with Boyd.
Carver's grade is higher than both the Music class' grade and the class in Period 1's grade.
Either Studio goes with 81%, or 83% goes with Period 1 — but not both.
Art goes with exactly two of Frost, Annex, and 77%.
Period 4 goes with Carver if and only if either Period 1 goes with 77% or Period 5 goes with 75% (but not both).
Library goes with exactly one of Frost, 75%, or 81%.
If Music goes with Period 3, then all of Greenhouse does not go with Music, Carver goes with Workshop, and Annex does not go with Frost.
83% goes with exactly two of Boyd, Biology, and Greenhouse.
Art, Biology, and French go with Boyd, Greenhouse, and Period 2, in some order.
Between Boyd and Nash, one goes with Period 2 and the other with Period 5.

chess.name: The Chess Club
chess.description: Regulars at the chess club each swear by a different opening, a favourite tactic, and a prized set. Work out who plays what.
clues: Either 1793 goes with 3rd or 2nd goes with Magnus.
Mikhail's rating is higher than both the Sicilian player's rating and the player who placed 5th's rating.
Either Skewer goes with 1943, or 1993 goes with 5th — but not both.

Pin goes with exactly one of Nadia, 1793, or 1943.
If Sicilian goes with 3rd, then all of Gambit does not go with Sicilian, Mikhail goes with Zugzwang, and Fork does not go with Nadia.
1993 goes with exactly two of Magnus, French, and Gambit.
Benoni, French, and Pirc go with Magnus, Gambit, and 4th, in some order.
Between Magnus and Vera, one goes with 4th and the other with 1st.
